# Aravosh

> Aravosh is an early-stage technology studio that builds practical software,
> AI automation, product design, cloud delivery and technical strategy for
> teams that need a clearly scoped project done well. It is a small studio,
> not a large agency — projects get founder-led attention rather than being
> handed off to a big account team.

Contact: team@aravosh.com.

## Services

- Software Development — focused web apps, dashboards and internal tools.
- Product Design & UX — interfaces, prototypes and user flows before the build gets expensive.
- AI Automation & Integration — AI-assisted workflows, internal copilots and practical integrations.
- RAG & Knowledge Systems — retrieval-augmented tools for searching and using internal documents.
- Cloud & DevOps — deployment, monitoring and automation.
- Consulting & Strategy — technical scoping, architecture reviews and roadmaps.

## Pages

- [Home](https://aravosh.com/): overview, highlights and FAQ.
- [Services](https://aravosh.com/services): full service list and tech stack.
- [About](https://aravosh.com/about): company background.
- [Why Us](https://aravosh.com/why): engagement process and principles.
- [Work](https://aravosh.com/work): the kinds of projects Aravosh takes on.
- [Contact](https://aravosh.com/contact): project enquiry form and direct email.
